{% macro docs_sidebar(current_section, current_url) %}
{% set root = get_section(path="_index.md") %} {# Determine which top-level section we're in #} {% set_global active_top = "" %} {% for s in root.subsections %} {% set sec = get_section(path=s) %} {% if current_url is starting_with(sec.permalink) %} {% set_global active_top = sec.permalink %} {% endif %} {% endfor %}
    {# ── Depth 0: top-level sections, always visible ── #} {% for s in root.subsections %} {% set L0 = get_section(path=s) %} {% set L0_active = current_url is starting_with(L0.permalink) %}
  • {{ L0.title | split(pat="/") | last }} {% if L0.subsections %}{% endif %}
    • {# ── Depth 1: always visible and expanded ── #} {% for s1 in L0.subsections %} {% set L1 = get_section(path=s1) %} {% set L1_active = current_url is starting_with(L1.permalink) %}
  • {{ L1.title | split(pat="/") | last }} {% if L1.subsections %}{% endif %}
    • {# ── Depth 2: always visible, collapsed if has children and not active ── #} {% for s2 in L1.subsections %} {% set L2 = get_section(path=s2) %} {% set L2_active = current_url is starting_with(L2.permalink) %}
  • {{ L2.title | split(pat="/") | last }} {% if L2.subsections %}{% endif %}
    • {% for s3 in L2.subsections %} {% set L3 = get_section(path=s3) %} {% set L3_active = current_url is starting_with(L3.permalink) %}
  • {{ L3.title | split(pat="/") | last }} {% if L3.subsections %}{% endif %}
    • {% for s4 in L3.subsections %} {% set L4 = get_section(path=s4) %} {% set L4_active = current_url is starting_with(L4.permalink) %}
  • {{ L4.title | split(pat="/") | last }} {% if L4.subsections %}{% endif %}
    • {% for s5 in L4.subsections %} {% set L5 = get_section(path=s5) %} {% set L5_active = current_url is starting_with(L5.permalink) %}
  • {{ L5.title | split(pat="/") | last }} {% if L5.subsections %}{% endif %}
    • {% for s6 in L5.subsections %} {% set L6 = get_section(path=s6) %}
  • {{ L6.title | split(pat="/") | last }}
    • {% endfor %} {% endfor %} {% endfor %} {% endfor %} {% endfor %} {% endfor %} {% endfor %}
{% endmacro %}
